function.name: delegateTask
function.description: Delegate a bounded subtask to a specialized background agent. Use when: (1) the subtask is independent and can run in parallel, (2) you need specialized capabilities (code exploration, planning, review), (3) you want to protect main context from large results.

Task.description: Clear, self-contained task description. Include: what to do, why it matters, what you've already learned, expected output format.

AgentType.description: Agent specialization name. Built-in types: 'explore' (fast code search), 'research' (deep analysis), 'plan' (architecture design), 'review' (code quality/security), 'test' (running tests), 'general' (default). Custom agent types defined in agents/*.md are also supported.

Context.description: Additional context for the agent to understand the task better.

background.description: Background information about why this task is needed.

constraints.description: Constraints or requirements the agent should follow.

relevant_files.description: List of file paths that are relevant to this task.

expected_output.description: Description of the expected output format or structure.

Model.description: Optional model override for the child agent.

MaxToolCalls.description: Optional upper bound for child-agent tool calls. Defaults vary by agent type (explore: 8, research: 20, plan: 10, review: 15, test: 12, general: 6).

TimeoutSeconds.description: Optional soft timeout budget in seconds.

Priority.description: Optional task priority. Higher numbers are scheduled first when the delegated-task queue is busy. Defaults to the runtime's configured default priority.

UseCache.description: If true (default), allow completed delegated-task results with the same task fingerprint to be served from cache. Set false for freshness-critical work.

RunInBackground.description: If true (default), return immediately and check status later. If false, wait for completion before returning.
